message:
style: apply rustfmt across codebase

Automated formatting pass affecting 22 files across doctor_frankentui,
ftui-harness, ftui-layout, ftui-render, ftui-runtime, and ftui-widgets
crates. Changes are purely whitespace/formatting:

- Collapse multi-line function signatures that fit on one line
- Expand compact struct literals to multi-line form
- Reflow method chains and assert macro arguments
- Reorder use imports alphabetically within groups
- Reformat match arm bodies and benchmark closures
- Align trailing comments

No semantic or logic changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
